title: Upload crashes on large files
body: The upload flow crashes when I try a 120MB file. Steps to reproduce: upload a large file. Expected: upload should complete. Actual: the client exits with an error.

title: Possible auth bypass vulnerability
body: I found a security issue where a token might be reused after logout. Please review urgently.

title: App does not work
body: It fails and I am blocked, but I do not have more details yet.
